message.content:
1. Agentic micropayments let autonomous agents buy data, compute, and services on-demand, reducing upfront procurement and integration overhead.  
2. They enable fine-grained, pay-per-use pricing so customers only pay for actual consumption, improving cost control and budget predictability.  
3. Micropayments make it economical to monetize small API calls, model inferences, and digital content that are impractical to sell via subscriptions.  
4. They allow real-time settlement between agents, shrinking payment friction and speeding up automated supply-chain and workflow execution.  
5. By attaching payments to verifiable actions and receipts, they can improve auditability and reduce disputes in machine-to-machine transactions.
